column8: Moderately weak to moderately strong, brownish pink spotted black and white, moderately decomposed medium to coarse grained GRANITE (CORESTONE)

Strong, pinkish grey spotted black and white, slightly decomposed medium to coarse grained GRANITE with widely spaced, extremely narrow, rough planar, limonite stained and clean joints, dipping 10 degrees-20 degrees, 80 degrees-85 degrees
weak to moderately weak, brownish pink spotted black and white, highly to moderately decomposed medium to coarse grained GRANITE.
